_note: BUM BOT Status Board (Master Sheet) — Phase 1. READ-ONLY mirror of ClickUp video status. List IDs + editor user IDs are reused from the Sendouts config.json. Holds only IDs / names / quota — NO secrets (CLICKUP_API_TOKEN + APP_PASSCODE are env vars only). Client order here is the row order on the board.
_carryNote: Reels still owed (unposted) from more than carryOverWeeks ago are treated as old misses: they stay a deficit in their own week but are no longer rolled into the current week's target. A late post still counts at any age.

shootScheduler._note: Phase 1 shoot-scheduling watchdog. It is the ONLY component allowed to write to ClickUp (DMs as BUM BOT). Recipient IDs + the Google service-account key are ENV vars, never here. Per-client shoot frequency (months between shoots) + calendar title aliases live under each client's 'shoot'. No-shoot reminders to Juan escalate by weeks-until-short: >=3 wks Mon only, 2 wks Mon/Wed/Fri, <=1 wk daily; a booked shoot is fine if on/before Tue of the last covered week, otherwise the team is alerted.

_postTypeNote: Only tasks whose Post Type (PM) dropdown = 'Reel | Vertical Video' are shown/counted. ClickUp returns this dropdown's value as the option orderindex (a number); we match that, and also tolerate the option UUID / name. If the dropdown is ever reordered in ClickUp, update reelPostType.orderindex.
